masterReferences.role: Attack identity, equipment, palette, scale, camera, and foot-line master
Idle identity and cross-state anchor master

productionMethod.description: The exact shared Attack/Idle master supplies the face, hood, hair, torso, costume, longbow, bowstring, quiver, lighting, palette, camera, and scale in every frame. Only the two lower-body silhouettes are articulated around fixed hip seams for the eight-step in-place cycle. Subpixel upper-body displacement stays below one pixel, with restrained quiver/cape lag. Each frame is compared with the preceding frame while both masters remain the pixel source, preventing cumulative identity drift.
productionMethod.alpha: transparent alpha inherited from the verified shared master; detached resampling islands below the production threshold are removed
productionMethod.canvasNormalization: 320x480, anchor [0.5,0.92], one grounded support/contact foot at the shared baseline in every frame
productionMethod.rootMotion: in-place; no baked horizontal world movement

frames.visualReference: Idle PR #39 frame 000 and Attack PR #31 frame 000
hero.archer_move_006.png, both master references, and loop target hero.archer_move_000.png

reviewArtifacts.usage: review only; never substitutes for the eight separate PNG frames

note: Motion-test candidate only. No held pose is intentionally byte-identical. This provenance does not claim canonical artwork or approval.
